entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: The crop Arachis hypogaea L. studied for phosphorus uptake and utilization efficiency

entities.name: PHOSPHORUS
entities.description: The essential nutrient being analyzed for uptake, translocation, and use

entities.name: PHOSPHORUS UPTAKE
entities.description: The capacity of the plant to absorb phosphorus from the soil

entities.name: PHOSPHORUS TRANSLOCATION
entities.description: The movement of phosphorus within the plant tissues

entities.name: PHOSPHORUS ACCUMULATION
entities.description: The total amount of phosphorus stored in the plant

entities.name: PHOSPHORUS UTILIZATION
entities.description: The efficiency of the plant in using absorbed phosphorus

entities.name: PHOSPHORUS EFFICIENCY RATIO
entities.description: The ratio of dry matter or yield produced per unit of phosphorus absorbed

entities.name: ROOT LENGTH
entities.description: The physical length of the root system contributing to phosphorus efficiency

entities.name: P UPTAKE RATE PER UNIT ROOT LENGTH
entities.description: The amount of phosphorus absorbed relative to the length of the root

entities.name: DRY MATTER YIELD PER UNIT P ABSORBED
entities.description: The biomass or yield produced per unit of phosphorus absorbed

entities.name: SOIL PHOSPHORUS AVAILABILITY
entities.description: The level of phosphorus available in the soil, which can be low or high

relationships.description: is the nutrient being absorbed in
